note: Pre-rendered ElevenLabs narration for the NPC Narrator. The generator renders one mp3 per id into this folder. The page picks a random clip from the contextually-correct bank and stitches building blocks (section_/round_/num_) for dynamic counts. Unit names are NEVER voiced (user-typed) — they stay on screen.

clips.typein_shooting: A shooting unit answers the call.
clips.typein_hybrid: A hybrid — it'll shoot or charge as it pleases.
clips.typein_melee: A melee unit, hungry for contact.
clips.act_advObjShoot_1: They press onto the objective and let rip.
clips.act_advObjShoot_3: They advance on the objective and open fire. Frightfully impolite.
clips.act_rushObj_1: They leg it for the objective. No time for tea.
clips.act_rushObj_2: A mad dash for the objective.
clips.act_rushObj_3: They bolt for the objective like the last train home.
clips.act_advEnShoot_1: They stalk your nearest unit and open fire.
clips.act_advEnShoot_2: Advancing, rifles singing. Do hold still.
clips.act_advEnShoot_3: They close in and put rounds downrange.
clips.act_rushEn_1: They barrel at your nearest lot. Brace yourselves.
clips.act_rushEn_2: A headlong rush at the nearest enemy.
clips.act_rushEn_3: They stampede in — mind the upholstery.
clips.act_chargeWay_1: They charge the fools in the way. Out of the way!
clips.act_chargeWay_2: Bayonets fixed — into whatever's blocking the path.
clips.act_chargeWay_3: They crash into the unit in their way. Terribly sorry. Not.
clips.act_chargeNear_1: They charge the nearest enemy. How dreadfully aggressive.
clips.act_chargeNear_2: A charge — all teeth and appalling manners.
clips.act_chargeNear_3: They fling themselves at the nearest enemy. Cheerio.
clips.act_holdShoot_1: They hold the line and open fire. Textbook.
clips.act_holdShoot_2: Dug in, and the guns do the talking.
clips.act_holdShoot_3: They stand their ground and let rip.
clips.act_holdNone_1: They hold. Nothing worth shooting — how disappointing.
clips.act_holdNone_2: No targets. They sit and sulk.
clips.act_holdNone_3: Holding position. Not a soul in range.
clips.q_OBJ_1: Any objective still going spare that this lot could make for?
clips.q_OBJ_2: Is there open ground worth taking?
clips.q_INWAY_1: Is anyone daft enough to be in their way — within six inches of the route?
clips.q_INWAY_2: Anything blocking the path, within six inches?
clips.q_CHGWAY_1: Close enough to charge the blighters? Twelve inches, sixteen if they're Fast.
clips.q_RUSHONLY_1: Is the objective a Rush away, but too far to Advance and shoot?
clips.q_ADVOBJ_1: If they advance to the objective, will anything be in range to shoot?
clips.q_ENCHG_1: Anything in charge range this very instant?
clips.q_ADVEN_1: If they advance on the nearest enemy, will it be in range to shoot?
clips.q_INRANGE_1: Anything in range of these guns?
clips.dice_zero_1: Not a single hit. How embarrassing.
clips.dice_zero_2: They couldn't hit a barn door.
clips.laststand_1: This is the last of them. No reinforcements, no mercy.
clips.laststand_2: Down to their final breath — and twice as dangerous.
clips.laststand_3: The last one standing. Make them earn it.
clips.shaken_1: They've lost their nerve — cowering, pulling themselves together. Pathetic.
clips.shaken_2: Shaken. They huddle and recover. How embarrassing.
clips.shaken_3: Nerves gone — they do nothing useful this turn.
clips.alldone_1: That's the lot. The machine rests. Your move, Commander.
clips.alldone_2: Every unit's had its turn. Over to you.
clips.bonus_level_1: We hold as much ground as you — the lads fight with extra venom. Plus one to hit.
clips.bonus_ahead_1: We hold more ground than you. Plus one to hit, and we'll be insufferable about it.
clips.bonus_behind_1: We're behind — so it's plus one to hit and plus one to defence, and they're furious about it.
clips.bonus_untracked_1: Mark the objectives, and I'll tally the challenge bonus myself.
clips.ambush_1: Loose the ambushers — somewhere rude, over nine inches from your lot.
